name: ask-mvp
description: ASK MVP: on-chain policy registry + runtime enforcer + decision logger

scripts.test:contracts: bash -lc 'if command -v forge >/dev/null 2>&1; then cd contracts && forge test -q; else echo "forge not found: skipping Solidity tests (install Foundry to enable)"; fi'
scripts.test: npm run test:runtime && npm run test:contracts
